description: Screen-reader smoke run over the profile delete-account modal. Mounts <mc-delete-account-modal> with an impersonated learner (aluno@exemplo.com.br), asserts the modal is a properly labelled dialog (role=dialog, aria-modal=true, aria-labelledby=mc-delete-modal-title), initial focus lands on the typed-confirm input, the destructive CTA starts disabled, and the full destructive confirmation — title, body paragraphs, typed-confirm field label + help, cancel, and destructive button — is narrated in PT-BR.
requiredPhrases: Isso removerá permanentemente suas aulas, progresso e preferências.
Você sairá logo em seguida. Sempre pode criar conta novamente com o mesmo e-mail mais tarde.
